block_03: as the product team at IQ Option, we constantly strive to provide the best customer experience, and your input plays a crucial role in our ongoing efforts. We are now looking for dedicated traders who are willing to take part in a 1.5 hour Zoom interview.
block_05: All interviewees will be rewarded with
block_07: Fill in the form below to express your interest in participating. Together, let's redefine the way we trade and unlock new possibilities of IQ Option.
block_09: Being a part of a community of like-minded traders, we believe your experiences, preferences, and challenges when it comes to trading are invaluable for this study. Your input will directly impact the development of the platform and enhance your trading journey.
block_10: To qualify, you need to meet these simple criteria:
block_11: 1. You are ready to participate in a 1.5-hour recorded Zoom interview;
block_12: 2. You are located in Colombia, Mexico, or Brazil.
block_13: The interview may be conducted in English, Spanish, or Portuguese.
